title: Self Stirring Mug,Rechargeable automatic magnetic Self stirring coffee mug,Rotating Home Office Travel Mixing Cup,To Stir Coffee, Chocolate, Milk, Protein,Cocoa Etc, Great For Office, School, Gym…
description:
About this item
Stainless steel liner + plastic shell
【Automatic Magnetic Stirring Coffee Mug】No spoon needed, just add your favorite powder (coffee, cocoa powder, hot chocolate, milk, protein shake, lemonade, broth, etc.) to the cup and press the button to mix the powder and liquid evenly, whether at home, office, gym, school, etc., you can all enjoy the drink to your heart's content.（Note: Can only be used to stir liquid and powder drinks, very viscous liquids and large particles of lumpy objects can not be used for mixing）
【USB Rechargeable】Rechargeable Self Stirring Mug equipped with a 400mAh battery, Adopting magnetic stirring technology， it can be stirred multiple times after each full charge. There is no need to replace the battery, water doesn't seep into the battery area, and safer.
【Easy to operate】press the automatic stirring button on the magnetic mug, and the stirring Rod at the bottom will rotate, Mix the solute and solvent particles evenly. Stirring without splashing, Press again to stop stirring. Separable Magnetic Stir Bar, corrosion-resistant, easy to clean, tested, and strongly adsorbed to the bottom of the cup, avoid swallowing.
【Material & Easy to clean】The inner liner of the automatic mixing cup is made of food-grade 304 stainless steel, and the outer shell is made of food-grade plastic. The double-layer design of the cup body will not burn your hands when the boiling water is poured into the cup. It is also easy to clean. Just use tap water to clean it. （Please note: Hand wash only, not dishwasher or microwave）
【Customer Service】We want our customers to be happy when they use our self stirring cup, our customer service staff will listen to your questions or concerns every day, we offer quality assurance and money back guarantee, and we won't settle for something you don't like, if you're not satisfied, please contact us.
reviews_5s: I love this cup, it actually froths my milk in the cup, my coffee taste so good. However, it now doesn’t work, I have to get another one, but if this one dies, I’m done with it. It died after 5 weeks. I’m charging it for a long time. order the one that uses batteries.Loved it! Easy to pack on trips. Works very well.I was looking for a self stirring coffee mug that wouldn't leak inside. The first one I tried from someone else was horrible! Then I tried this one that had thousands of reviews and I'm so happy I tried it out. It hasn't leaked once and it is easy to use. It stirs in my collagen without any issue. So happy I purchased this. Highly recommend!I love the café. I use it every day for hot chocolate at night coffee in the morning seems great doesn’t leak stays cold or hot which ever I want to.. Very durable I highly recommend this one. I know there’s lots of reviews out there, but I’m telling you can’t go wrong with this one. I have bought lots and tickets sent lots back because they leaked and didn’t work. This one is fabulous. I probably should buy another one to keep it on hand, just in case I lose mine or something. Because every time they make something good, you can never buy it again when you need to.My husband is obsessed with this cup! Loves the amount of stirring power it has.My husband absolutely loved it!! That was his favorite Christmas gift.Wife loves it!Very goodLight the light weight easy for me to hold lost all my fingers down to the knuckles, this makes easier dont have use a spoon to stir that is hard to do as well and this makes it so much easier. ...Give you 10💫 Think Im gonna buying my sister one ☺️ Luv itWorks great just be alert with the magnet
reviews_1s:
I bought this cup early for my husband’s birthday in November. The cup itself works great, my husband loved how it stirs itself. Cleaning it is another story. The port where you charge the cup does not seal tightly as it should and water got into it. It rusted and eventually stopped working. He didn’t have use of it for a full month.Bought this cup for a Christmas gift & should have opened it when I received it. No instructions, no why to figure out how to operate. Don't purchase this item ever, & now I can't return for a refund 😭I’ve been very careful in washing and charging my cup. I’ve only had it for just over a month and it has already stopped working. Would not buy again.Worked great for a month. Then it died.Only had it 1 month and it stopped working! I was going to purchase several for Christmas presents now I have to keep shopping for something else. It stopped 11/1 return expiration date 10/30. So disappointing.Spinner magnet can fly off while spinning and you can possibly swallow it!!Product did not last 1 month.Worked 1 day. Does not charge. The red light comes on but never charges. It works when the cord is plugged in.--- 1ST one received would not charge, amazon send me a second one, but my gosh
this thing is SLOW !!

just way to slow, unusable as intended
might serve as a regular cup, but not as a
"self stirring"

save your money and stir it with your spoonGave as a gift, friend gave it back, instructions ? Cant figure out where battery goes, unless i dismantle it, dont bother, instructions are very poor next to none
